case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (U.S.A.), N.A. VS. DON CHOI et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (U.S.A.), N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHOI, DON $6,694.35 PRINCIPAL, $994.07 INTEREST, $227.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,915.42, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $227.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CHOI, DON
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT : 1. DEFAULT JUDGMENT ( CCP 585) 2. ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS ( CCP 1033) 3. COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS ( EVID 1550) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (U.S.A.), N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (U.S.A.), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT CHOI, DON DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-26-2009
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (U.S.A.), N.A. SERVED SEP-27-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHOI, DON
